title: SULIVES Wine Opener Set (5 Pack) - Waiter's Corkscrew, Foil Cutter, Waiter's Friend, Bottle Opener
features: 【Precision Craftsmanship】 Crafted with precision using high-grade 403 stainless steel, this wine opener ensures durability, resistance to rust, and precise cutting. The lightweight design, weighing only 47 grams, provides effortless handling for precise and accurate use.

【Versatile Functionality】 This wine opener serves as a multipurpose tool, including a waiter's corkscrew, foil cutter, and bottle opener. With a convenient 5-pack set, it offers versatility for various beverage needs, perfect for both professional servers and wine enthusiasts.

【Ergonomic and Safe Design】 Featuring an aluminum alloy handle, this wine opener provides a comfortable and secure grip for easy handling. Its smooth edges not only ensure a comfortable grip but also prioritize safety during usage, minimizing the risk of accidents.

【Easy Maintenance for Longevity】 Designed with a one-piece construction, this opener allows for effortless cleaning, promoting long-term use. It's crucial to avoid high-temperature sterilization to prevent aging and deformation, ensuring prolonged product lifespan.

【Quality Assurance and Customer Support】 This wine opener guarantees tight and secure functionality owing to its high-quality craftsmanship. Alongside this, the product is backed by dedicated customer service, ready to address any inquiries or concerns promptly.
